past_challenges.raw: Coming from South Korea, I underestimated how different the classroom culture would be here. Professors expected me to speak up and participate, but back home we never challenged instructors or shared personal opinions in class. I felt lost for weeks.

Making friends as an international student was really hard because the social norms were so different. I didn't get a lot of the cultural references and felt like an outsider even in group conversations. Finding other international students first helped me build confidence.
